recommendations.title: Hot Young Bloods
recommendations.overview: A comedy romance movie about the last generation of youths and their passionate romance based in Hongseong, Chungcheong Namdo in the 1980s.

recommendations.title: Aloners
recommendations.overview: Jina is the top employee at a credit card company call center. She avoids building close relationships, choosing instead to live and work alone – until she is suddenly tasked with training a new recruit.

recommendations.title: The Mimic
recommendations.overview: The mother of a missing child takes in a lost girl she finds in the woods, but soon begins to wonder if she is even human.

recommendations.title: Ghost Mansion
recommendations.overview: A horror webtoon writer journeys to a shabby apartment building in search of ideas. The building's caretaker tells him about multiple strange events that happened throughout the building's history.

recommendations.title: Steel Rain
recommendations.overview: Amid a coup, a North Korean agent escapes south with the country's injured leader in an attempt to keep him alive and prevent a Korean war.

recommendations.title: Hansel & Gretel
recommendations.overview: When Eun-soo gets lost in a country road, he meets a mysterious girl and is led to her fairytale ike house in the middle of the forest. There, Eun-soo is trapped with the girl and her siblings who never age. Eun-soo finally discovers a way out which

recommendations.title: I due carabinieri
recommendations.overview: Two deadbeat friends barely pass the entrance exam for the Carabinieri, the national gendarmerie of Italy, but love for the same woman gets in the way.

recommendations.title: The Negotiation
recommendations.overview: An ace crisis negotiator attempts to figure out the real motivation of a man who has kidnapped two people and crack his calm demeanour.

recommendations.title: Anaïs in Love
recommendations.overview: A young woman struggling to stay on top of everything in her life meets a married publisher and begins an affair with him.

recommendations.title: Playing It Cool
recommendations.overview: A young man meets and instantly falls in love with an engaged woman.
